name: graphscout
summary: Cached, incremental code-graph maps so AI agents query code structure instead of reading whole files. `explore` returns verbatim source + call edges + blast radius in one call; plus FTS5 search, multi-hop impact analysis, and import-based affected-tests. CLI + MCP server, wires into Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, and Cursor. Auto-sync watch mode.
author: Duc Nguyen
